zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Lewknor於大約1435年出生在英國英格蘭素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯時，她的父親Sir Thomas Lewknor44歲，母親Elizabeth Echingham42歲。她於1451年與Thomas Goode XII在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1464年在英國英格蘭肯特享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Lewknor于大约1435年出生在英国英格兰素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Lewknor44岁，母亲Elizabeth Echingham42岁。她于1451年与Thomas Goode XII在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1464年在英国英格兰肯特享年30岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Lewknor was born about 1435, in Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Lewknor, was 44 and her mother, Elizabeth Echingham, was 42. She married Thomas Goode XII in 1451, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1464, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30, and was buried in Horsted Keynes, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Thomas Goode XII en 1451, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1464, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Horsted Keynes, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1451 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Goode XII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. ko.St Giles' Churchyard, Horsted Keynes, We: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 호르스테드 케인스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lewknor(이)가 대략 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르스테드 케인스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Lewknor(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Echingham(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1451년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Thomas Goode XII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 호르스테드 케인스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lewknor nasceu aproximadamente 1435, em Horsted Keynes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Lewknor, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Echingham, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Goode XII em 1451, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1464, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Horsted Keynes, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Giles' Churchyard, Horsted Keynes, We: хаурстед кинесь, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Lewknor родилась около 1435 г. в местности хаурстед кинесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Lewknor было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Echingham, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Goode XII в 1451 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1464 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности хаурстед кинесь, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
